message:
feat(engine): add 209 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Eighth batch of enrichment tests:

- epoch_barrier: 43 tests (barrier states, transition evidence,
  draining rejection, force cancel, stale guards, determinism)
- evidence_contract: 34 tests (cross-field validation, rollout
  permutations, JSON field stability, mutation workflows)
- evidence_emission: 44 tests (action categories, emitter config,
  canonical emitter lifecycle, emission requests)
- extension_host_authority_guard: 43 tests (violation kinds, exemption
  registry, audit operations, import detection, type shadowing)
- extension_host_lifecycle: 45 tests (load/unload lifecycle, session
  CRUD, cancellation, shutdown, event tracking, error codes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
